title: matelea refracta
intro: Matelea refracta, also known as the "Twisted Vine," is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Matelea refracta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in various herbal preparations, including salves and creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
